title: Pascal
body:
<center>
  
![Pascal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13d3c68844f364a7170999d63ba71e99220979b6.gif)
  
</center>

This pack fufills two purposes, to have a pack with lesser known/more unique (no offense) mods and to have a pack for my friends to play on for a week.

All images in the gallery were taken **WITHOUT** shaders.

## Social mods-
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- CC: Restitched
- Joy of Painting
- Immersive Melodies (with 11 additional songs!)
- More Chat History
</details>

## Tech Mods
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Yttr
- That's it
</details>

## Magic Mods
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Hex Casting (and a bunch of addons)
- Spectrum
</details>

## World
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Cave Enhancements
- Continents
- Distant Horizons
- Enderscape
- Gardens of the Dead
- Terralith
- Maybe too many more
</details>

## Travel
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Blast Travel
- Do a Barrel Roll
- River Redux
- Boat with Everything
</details>
